doc: PATTERN CARDS v1 — caption MECHANISMS (chain-style, hand-drafted by the orchestra from the clean+SHORT pool + Mohamed gold/kills; RABIE-judged PROVISIONAL). Nothing enters the prompt menu before Mohamed ratifies. A ratified pattern becomes a PLAYER (attribution + bench arithmetic).

survivors.move: Ask the audience a REAL taste question and stay silent — the comments become the content. NEVER a comparison question: the brand never asks who does it better (Mohamed's law: the brand IS the best). Ask about THEIR habits, preferences, rituals — never about rivals or rankings.
survivors.skeleton: single-question hook + curious peer register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the taste question about THEM (not us, not rivals), (2) hand the mic over, (3) brand stays silent
survivors.when: Community pillar, drink/dish debates with real factions (karak spice, matcha, mandi vs madhbi), engagement weeks. NOT when the brand secretly wants one answer (rigged polls smell), and not as a mask for product launches.
survivors.example_real: تحبون الماتشا؟
survivors.example_fresh: الكرك بهيل ولا زعفران؟ احسموها 👇
survivors.anti: COMPARISON CREEP — any 'who does it best/أفضل مقهى' framing is dead by law (brand_never_invites_comparison). Also: rigged questions where only the brand can be the answer, and asking then ghosting the replies.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B has the loudest taste tribes in Saudi (karak, kabsa rice schools, bakery wars). Beauty version exists (blush shades); avoid in real estate where 'debate' reads as doubt.
survivors.judge_why: The rarest confidence play in the pool — brand asks a real factional question and stays silent, even pointing beyond its own menu; corpus gold, sharp anti against rigged funnels. | OWNER CORRECTION: strip all who-does-it-best framing.
survivors.status: REVISED per Mohamed correction — ready for re-ratification

survivors.move: Seat two generations in one frame and let the elder's smallest gesture — a smile, a hand, an inherited recipe — carry the whole feeling, with the product as the table between them, never the subject.
survivors.skeleton: quiet declarative hook, no question · tender register, zero slang, zero exclamation · <=12 words · beat 1: the shared object, beat 2: the elder's (or heir's) gesture that completes it.
survivors.when: Eids, family seasons, heritage pillars. The law applies hardest here: no selling on emotional days — run it CTA-free, or with a soft order-line only on ordinary days.
survivors.example_real: وصفة جدتي نفسها، بس اليوم بيد حفيدتها 🤍
survivors.example_fresh: وصفة جدتي نفسها، بس اليوم بيد حفيدتها 🤍
survivors.anti: Grandparent-as-prop: the elder appears only to bless the brand. And the worn-formula graveyard — لحظة/يجمعنا are this move's corpse; write the gesture itself, never the word 'gathering'.
survivors.sector_flavor: universal — F&B: the inherited dish; fashion: the father's watch on the son's wrist; beauty: the mother's perfume on the daughter; real estate: the house that holds three generations.
survivors.judge_why: Mohamed-golded mechanism (one bite + the elder's concrete detail); CONDITION: swap example_real — لحظات hits the banned لحظة root — the clean fresh line is the legal gold. Kept (unlike long_day_exhale) because the move is unique and golded, the violation is one fixable citation.
survivors.note: judge condition applied: original example_real used banned لحظة root — replaced

survivors.move: Take the dish's literal Arabic root and bend it into a verb acting on the reader — the name itself does the persuasion, so adjectives are banned from the sentence.
survivors.skeleton: pun hook + playful-confident register + <=12 words + beats: (1) dish name, (2) its root re-conjugated onto the reader's mind/day, (3) optional smirk emoji — no second clause explaining the joke
survivors.when: Product pillar, evergreen crave posts, dishes whose names carry a live root (مقلوبة/مسحب/مضغوط/ملفوف). NOT for borrowed names with no Arabic root (برجر، بيتزا) — forcing it reads as trying too hard — and never on heavy days.
survivors.example_real:
‏مقلوبة الدجاج لذتها تشقلب عقلك.. وتخطف قلبك 😌🧡

‏#مطاعم_الرومانسية
survivors.example_fresh: المضغوط الوحيد اللي يفك ضغطك 😌
survivors.anti: Wordplay stacked twice (تشقلب عقلك AND تخطف قلبك) tips into cliche — one twist, then stop. Worst form: puns so obvious every competitor already made them, which re-creates the every-brand-sounds-the-same disease. HARD LAW: the double meaning must never be sexual or humiliating.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B-specific goldmine: Saudi dish names are verbs frozen in time. Beauty can borrow (بلسم/يبلسم), fashion rarely can.
survivors.judge_why: Pure craft: the dish name itself does the persuasion, adjectives structurally banned, scoped to live-root names only; the one-twist anti correctly indicts its own gold's double-twist.
survivors.status: RATIFIED with condition: no sexual innuendo, no humiliation (his big rule)

survivors.move: On national or sacred days the brand steps out from behind the counter and stands inside the collective 'we' — pure shared pride or gratitude, with product, offer, and menu structurally absent.
survivors.skeleton: declarative we-statement hook + dignified celebratory register + <=12 words + beats: (1) اليوم/المناسبة anchor, (2) collective emotion in first-person plural, (3) flag/identity close — brand exists only as signature hashtag
survivors.when: Founding Day, National Day, Flag Day, Hajj season. This is the ONLY legal move on religious/emotional days per the red lines. NOT a stage for combos, prices, or 'celebrate with our offer' — and never weld dua to the brand name in one caption.
survivors.example_real:
اليوم نحتفل بإنجازاتنا، واليوم نعيش العز والعزم 🇸🇦 🌴
#يوم_التأسيس_السعودي #حاشي_باشا
survivors.example_fresh: من التأسيس لليوم… والعز يكبر فينا 🇸🇦
survivors.anti: The smuggle: pride sentence + 'بكومبو ولا أروع' in the same breath — patriotism as a coupon. Equally dead: interchangeable greeting-card lines (كل عام وأنتم بخير alone) that any of 500 brands could have posted.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal law, but F&B faces the strongest temptation (occasion combos) — so the card matters most here.
survivors.judge_why: The only legal move on sacred days and it knows it — product structurally absent, the smuggle (pride + combo) named precisely in the anti; this card is load-bearing for the red lines.

survivors.move: Claim one weekday, marry it to one dish, and summon the regulars to publicly declare membership — the dish is the calendar's excuse, the ritual is the subject.
survivors.skeleton: greeting/roll-call hook + street-warm Saudi register + <=12 words + beats: (1) name the owned day-dish pair, (2) call out 'the one who...' persona, (3) one micro-action (raise hand / emoji / like)
survivors.when: Recurring weekly content, community pillar, slow news weeks — builds an owned asset that compounds. NOT on religious or national days (a shawarma Sunday cannot share the stage with Eid), and never launch two named days at once.
survivors.example_real:
هلا ومسهلا ومليييون هلا😎
المشتاق للـ #الأحد_الشاورمري 
يرفع يده ويعطيني لايك👀
survivors.example_fresh: الخميس المندي رجع… حط ✋ إذا قعدتكم محجوزة من الحين
survivors.anti: Dies when the day is named but never repeated (a ritual posted once is just an ad), or when every brand names the same day — the asset is exclusivity plus consistency, not the pun.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B native (weekly crave cycles map to weekdays). Portable to fitness (leg day) and retail (restock day); meaningless for real estate.
survivors.judge_why: Compounding owned asset (day+dish+persona+micro-action); sharper twin of owned_weekday_ritual — same move, same الأحد_الشاورمري gold — absorb the merged card's cross-sector flavor line.

survivors.move: Describe the dish only by the future behavior it causes in the eater — the loop back, the repeat order, the predicted next visit — so the product is proven by what people DO, with zero taste adjectives.
survivors.skeleton: name-then-consequence hook + knowing-smirk register + <=12 words + beats: (1) dish or single trial named, (2) the behavioral prophecy (you'll be back / we know your next order), (3) confident close, no explanation
survivors.when: Product pillar, signature items with genuine repeat behavior, evergreen crave posts. NOT for brand-new untested items (a return-loop claim with no returners is an invented promise) and not stacked with offers.
survivors.example_real:
مسحب جامبو⁣
طعم يخلّيك ترجع له 😋❤️‍🔥⁣
⁣
#مسحب_جامبو #هرفي #Herfy
survivors.example_fresh: جربته مرة؟ خلاص… نعرف وش بتطلب بكرة 😌
survivors.anti: Sliding back into adjective porn ('لذيذ، طعم خرافي، ولا أروع') — the second an adjective appears the move is dead. Also worn: 'يخليك ترجع له' verbatim is one brand's line; copy the MECHANIC (predicted behavior), never the phrase, and 'له طعم ثاني' is banned outright.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B core (craving literally is repeat behavior). Beauty parallel: 'you'll repurchase before it's empty'. Useless where purchase cycles are yearly.
survivors.judge_why: Product proven by predicted behavior, zero adjectives; anti correctly bans copying the gold's phrase and له طعم ثاني outright — mechanic-not-phrase discipline at its best.

survivors.move: Surface one ultra-specific shared childhood artifact from the audience's generation and ask 'do you remember?' — the brand is the friend who found the old photo, and the product appears only as that era's companion, if at all.
survivors.skeleton: artifact-then-question hook + soft-gasp register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the named relic (Spacetoon characters, school sandwich, juice box), (2) ellipsis pause, (3) the memory-check question (تذكرتوهم؟/ذكرتك؟)
survivors.when: Evergreen community content, anniversary moments, collabs with era-icons (the Herfy×Spacetoon model), millennial/Gen-Z targeting. NOT for audiences too young for the reference, and never as cover for a price push — monetized nostalgia reads as manipulation.
survivors.example_real:
شخصيات من أيام ما تنسى… تذكّرتوهم؟🤩⁣
⁣
#شباب_المستقبل #هرفي #سبيستون #Herfy #Spacetoon⁣
survivors.example_fresh: فطور أيام المدرسة… شطيرة جبنة وعصير علبة. ذكرتك؟ 🥹
survivors.anti: Era-vague mush ('أيام زمان الحلوة') that triggers nothing — nostalgia only fires on a SPECIFIC artifact the reader can see. Also fails when the reference is borrowed from another culture's childhood (US cafeteria tropes) instead of the Saudi 90s/2000s canon.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B is privileged: taste memory is the strongest human memory channel (school canteen, grandmother's kitchen). Retail can use toys/stationery; banks cannot.
survivors.judge_why: Specific-artifact law (Saudi 90s/2000s canon, no era-mush) is what keeps nostalgia off the banned-sludge floor; Herfy×Spacetoon gold proves it. Absorbs the truncated do_you_remember duplicate.

survivors.move: Announce a new branch by reversing hospitality — the brand greets the CITY as the honored guest who lights up the house (تنورنا), making the town the hero and the branch merely the majlis.
survivors.skeleton: greeting hook (يا هلا/حياكم) + host-at-the-door register + <=12 words + beats: (1) direct address to the town's people by name, (2) the hospitality reversal (you honor US / we became neighbors), (3) zero product mention
survivors.when: Branch openings, expansion milestones, entering smaller cities (عرعر, أبها, حائل — where being SEEN matters most). NOT as a sales hook — no opening offers in the same caption — and not for the 400th Riyadh branch where scale-pride is the truer move.
survivors.example_real: الفرحه فرحتين، افتتاح فرعنا في عرعر وشوفتكم الي تنورنا
survivors.example_fresh: يا هلا بأهل أبها… من اليوم صرنا جيرانكم 🤍
survivors.anti: Treating the opening as the brand's achievement ('وصلنا! توسعنا!') — the moment the brand congratulates itself instead of greeting the town, the hospitality code inverts and reads as corporate conquest.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal for any physical expansion, but F&B carries it best — a restaurant IS a majlis, so the host-guest frame is literal, not metaphor.
survivors.judge_why: True hospitality-code reversal (the city is the guest, تنورنا) with corpus gold; the anti nails the exact inversion that kills it — brand congratulating itself.

survivors.move: Stage the sofra as a theater scene where dishes are named characters taking their positions — the writer is a narrator describing an entrance (يتصدر المشهد), not a menu listing items.
survivors.skeleton: scene-opening hook (time or curtain: وقت الإفطار حان / السفرة اكتملت) + cinematic-warm register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the moment named, (2) two dishes maximum given positions/roles, (3) the spread implied complete
survivors.when: Ramadan iftar/suhoor, Eid spreads, Friday family lunch — any moment with a real shared table. Best with heritage dish pairs (jereesh + kabli). NOT for single grab-and-go items, and during Ramadan it stays scene-only: no prices, no 'order now' welded on.
survivors.example_real: وقت الإفطار حان، والجريش والكابلي يتصدران المشهد على المائدة.
survivors.example_fresh: السفرة اكتملت: الكبسة بالنص والسليق عن يمينها 👑
survivors.anti: Listing more than two dishes turns theater back into a menu; and stock sofra-sentiment ('سفرتنا عامرة، أجواء عائلية') with no staging verb loses the move — the dishes must DO something (enter, lead, take the center), not just exist.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B exclusive at full power — the sofra is the sector's native stage. Hospitality variant: the majlis as the set, qahwa and dates as the cast.
survivors.judge_why: Dishes as named characters with staging verbs, hard-capped at two — the one mechanism that makes a menu post cinema instead of a list; Ramadan-legal by construction.

survivors.move: Sketch a two-person social scene with roles so precise everyone instantly casts a real friend in it, then command the tag — the product is only the table the characters meet over.
survivors.skeleton: scene-shorthand hook + mention command · insider playful register · <=10 words + 'منشنهم 👇' · beat 1: the scene in shorthand ('same seat, same roles'), beat 2: the tag command.
survivors.when: Community pillar, weekends, reunion seasons (post-Hajj, post-travel, holidays). NOT on solemn days; never when the assigned role could shame or mock the tagged person.
survivors.example_real:
نفس القعدة.. نفس الأدوار ☕​
 منشنهم 👇 😏

#مننا_ويفهم_جونا #بارنز
survivors.example_fresh: واحد يطلب ويندم، وواحد ياكل من صحنه.. منشنه 👇
survivors.anti: The scene goes generic ('tag your bestie!') and loses the observed detail — the move only fires when the role is specific enough to name one exact person in the reader's head.
survivors.sector_flavor: universal — F&B: the plate-thief; fashion: the friend who borrows and never returns; beauty: the one who always asks 'what lipstick is that?'; fitness: the warm-up-only partner.
survivors.judge_why: Two-role scene precise enough to cast one real friend — sharper skeleton than its twin table_role_tag (identical بارنز gold); absorb the twin's qa3da-as-deepest-unit insight into sector_flavor.

survivors.move: Let the actual sky over the city write the post — name the live weather event (first cold wave, dust storm, first rain) and have the menu ANSWER it, arriving like a reflex, not a promotion.
survivors.skeleton: now-anchor hook (أول/اليوم/وصلت) + alert-playful register + <=12 words + beats: (1) the named weather event, (2) the dish as immediate response, (3) speed/readiness beat — posted same-day or not at all
survivors.when: Real weather moments only: موجة برد, أول مطر, غبار, الثمامة camping season. The window is hours, not weeks. NOT during weather emergencies causing real harm (flood damage = silence), and never recycled ('الأجواء الحالية' in any season).
survivors.example_real:
مشروبات مناسبة جدا للأجواء الحالـية 🌴☀️

#صيف #موجة_برد #صيف
survivors.example_fresh: أول غبرة بالموسم؟ الشوربة جاهزة قبل تنبيه الأرصاد 🌪️
survivors.anti: Exactly what the real example shows: 'مناسبة للأجواء الحالية' — weather as vague wallpaper instead of a named, dated event (its own hashtags can't decide if it's summer or a cold wave). Specificity IS the move; without it this is the most generic line in F&B.
survivors.sector_flavor: F&B and hospitality first (cold = soup, dust = indoor majlis, الثمامة = camp-style outlets). Fashion can borrow for layering; weak elsewhere.
survivors.judge_why: Excellent time-locked mechanic (named event, hours-wide window) and honest about real harm — but its example_real is its own anti, so the move ships with zero corpus proof; find a real gold before ratification.

survivors.move: Call out one named, specific tribe inside the audience (يا أهلاوية، يا أمهات المستقبل) and speak to them alone while everyone else overhears — the product appears as the tribe's tool, never the topic.
survivors.skeleton: vocative hook (يا + tribe name) + playful/warm register + <=10 words + 2 beats: name the tribe → one insider promise or wink
survivors.when: Fan moments, micro-communities (brides, new moms, quiet-style abaya wearers), niche launches. NOT on national/religious unity days (excluding others reads wrong); never invent a tribe that doesn't self-identify.
survivors.example_real: يا أهلاوية, يمكن نون مفجإنكم😉
survivors.example_fresh: يا صاحبات الذوق الهادي… وصل اللي تدورينه
survivors.anti: 'يا عملاءنا الكرام' — addressing everyone is addressing no one; or stereotyping the tribe so the wink lands as mockery instead of belonging.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal; in fashion/beauty the tribes are style-identities (minimal-hijab, bold-lip), in retail they are fandoms and life-stages.
survivors.judge_why: Audience-of-one vocative done correctly (everyone else overhears); known copywriting move, but the يا عملاءنا الكرام anti and the no-invented-tribes fence earn the keep.

survivors.move: Ask the audience for one effortless personal detail and promise a playful personalized read back — the brand plays fortune-teller and the product is the prophecy, never the pitch.
survivors.skeleton: question hook + playful register + <=10 words + 2 beats: micro-ask → promised mirror ('…يشبهك')
survivors.when: Engagement days, community pillar, slow weeks between drops. NOT on solemn occasions; never as a disguised data grab and never with a discount as the 'answer'.
survivors.example_real:
قول لنا شهر ميلادك… 🥳 🎂 
ونقول لك أي حلى يشبهك 😋
survivors.example_fresh: قولي لونك المفضل… ونقولك أي عطر يشبهك
survivors.anti: The reply-trap: the brand never actually answers the comments, or answers every one with the same product link — the game dies in public and reads as bait.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal; fashion/beauty maps personality → look/scent, F&B maps mood → dish, retail maps life-stage → find.
survivors.judge_why: Fortune-teller engagement with the sharpest operational anti in the pool (the reply-trap — the game dies in public if comments go unanswered); distinct from crowd_judges and raise_your_hand.

survivors.move: Introduce the piece the way you'd introduce a friend — two or three personality traits in 'she is' voice ending on the wearer — so the customer recognizes herself in the product instead of being sold to.
survivors.skeleton: trait-list hook + warm/playful register + <=8 words + 3 beats: trait, trait, identity-turn toward the wearer
survivors.when: Single-hero product posts and new arrivals with strong character. NOT for technical products needing specs; not every post — a feed of personified 'shes' becomes a crowd of strangers.
survivors.example_real:
She’s cute, she’s practical, she’s @frenchconnectionme ✨🤍

كيوت، عملية، ومن Frenchconnection ✨🤍
survivors.example_fresh: هادية، عملية، وما تشبه أحد… مثلك
survivors.anti: Baby-talk cuteness, or traits that belong to no one ('عصرية وأنيقة' = every product ever made); the trait list must be specific enough to exclude every other product on the shelf.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion/beauty native; works for statement F&B items; awkward for groceries and utility retail.
survivors.judge_why: Personification with a real exclusion test — traits must rule out every other product on the shelf; the not-every-post fence shows the drafter saw the failure mode.

survivors.move: Announce that something is coming without naming it — let the grid, a crop, or a silhouette carry the reveal while the caption only points eyes at it and promises a near date.
survivors.skeleton: withheld-information hook + conspiratorial playful register + <=10 words + 2 beats: 'something is coming' → where/when to watch
survivors.when: Real launches, collabs, rebrands with payoff inside 72 hours. NOT for restocks or minor news (tease debt must be repaid), not during mourning or solemn national moments.
survivors.example_real: رمضان قرب… خلّي عينك على نون وشوف اللي جايك قريب🔥
survivors.example_fresh: في شي جاي يوم الخميس… واللي تعرفنا، عرفت 👀
survivors.anti: Tease with no payoff — audiences remember unpaid teases longer than launches; and the 🔥-urgency voice that makes a soft launch sound like a flash sale.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion native (the grid IS the medium); beauty for shade/line drops; retail for collabs.
survivors.judge_why: Tease-debt is a real and well-named law (unpaid teases outlive launches); minor self-contradiction — its own gold uses the 🔥-urgency its anti bans.

survivors.move: State the exact result she wants, then subtract the cost everyone assumes it requires (procedure, hours, ironing) — the product is the silent enabler of the shortcut, named once at most.
survivors.skeleton: result-first hook + confident calm register + <=9 words + 2 beats: the result → 'بدون' + the feared cost
survivors.when: Beauty tools, skincare, easy-wear fashion (no-iron abayas), time-poor audiences. NOT when the subtraction implies a medical claim or trashes a procedure her sister might use.
survivors.example_real:
شفاه ممتلئة أكثر… بدون فيلر💉

Fuller-looking lips… no filler needed 💉
survivors.example_fresh: لمعة سهرة كاملة… بدون ساعتين قدام المرايا
survivors.anti: Subtracting a cost nobody feared ('بدون مجهود' on a lipstick) is an empty claim; stacking three subtractions turns the voice into an infomercial.
survivors.sector_flavor: Beauty native; in fashion subtract effort (ironing, styling time), in retail subtract trips and waiting.
survivors.judge_why: Result-minus-feared-cost is a true mechanic and the medical/sister-shaming fences are correct; one-subtraction discipline keeps it off the infomercial floor.

survivors.move: Compress the entire reaction into one strong dialect word and stop — the visual does the selling and the caption acts as the customer's own gasp, with the brand nowhere in the sentence.
survivors.skeleton: one-word hook + casual register + 1–3 words total + single beat: the verdict, full stop
survivors.when: Killer visuals only — the photo must earn the silence. NOT for new-information posts (launches, openings) where one word leaves real questions unanswered.
survivors.example_real:
مهووسة 😍

Just one word: Obsessed 😍
survivors.example_fresh: بكلمة وحدة؟ خطيرة.
survivors.anti: Worn verdict words (روعة، تحفة، جنان) make it filler; and using it on a mediocre photo exposes the photo — one word leaves nothing to hide behind.
survivors.sector_flavor: Universal; in beauty pick texture words (كريمي), in fashion presence words (فخمة), in F&B craving words.
survivors.judge_why: Confidence-by-silence — legitimate move, not a format tag, because the visual-must-earn-it rule and the worn-word ban (روعة/تحفة) are real tests.

survivors.move: Curate existing pieces into a small named edit for a real occasion (Eid mornings, graduation, wedding season) and announce it as an arriving drop — the selection is the news, price is never in the sentence.
survivors.skeleton: arrival-statement hook + celebratory register + <=10 words + 2 beats: name the occasion edit → arrival/availability line
survivors.when: 2–3 weeks BEFORE Eid, weddings, back-to-school. NOT on the religious day itself (greeting only, zero selling — hard law), NOT with invented discounts or fake 'limited' scarcity.
survivors.example_real:
More sparkle. More celebration.

Shop the occasion edit on levelshoes.com
survivors.example_fresh: تشكيلة صباحية العيد وصلت… قطع تنلبس مرة ومرات
survivors.anti: Renaming the entire catalog 'Eid edit' — curation with 200 items is not curation; and the slow creep from 'drop' to 'sale' that turns occasion warmth into a price flyer.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion/retail native; beauty version is occasion kits (توزيعات العيد); F&B version is occasion menus.
survivors.judge_why: Curation-as-news with price banned from the sentence and the day-itself selling ban built in; the 200-item anti is the right tooth.

survivors.move: Take a playful public stance on a live trend — close it, crown it, or claim it — so the brand acts like a person with opinions in the group chat, the product entering only if the stance needs it.
survivors.skeleton: verdict hook + mock-official playful register + <=9 words + 2 beats: name the trend → deliver the ruling
survivors.when: Live fashion/beauty trends the audience already argues about. NOT for trends touching religion, politics, or modesty debates — the gavel only falls on safe topics.
survivors.example_real:
جينا نقفل الموضوع 🙅‍♀️🙅‍♂️🚨 
Just give us a break from this trend
survivors.example_fresh: ترند الشنطة الصغيرة… نعلن رسمياً انتهاءه 🙅‍♀️
survivors.anti: Arriving late — ruling on a dead trend reads as the uncle joining the meme; or punching at the customers who liked the trend instead of at the trend itself.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion/beauty/retail native — style verdicts are home turf; the F&B version judges food trends (برينجلز بالشوكولاتة).
survivors.judge_why: Brand-as-person-with-opinions, correctly fenced off religion/politics/modesty; the late-uncle and punching-at-customers antis are precise.

survivors.move: Repost a customer's or creator's styling of your piece and thank her by name for something specific her photo showed — the brand admires instead of sells, and her taste becomes the proof.
survivors.skeleton: credit hook (name or thanks first) + admiring warm register + <=10 words + 2 beats: what her styling revealed → the named thanks
survivors.when: UGC moments, community pillar, the quiet weeks between launches. Only with permission; NOT for paid placements disguised as organic gratitude; never recrop a woman's photo toward anything near the red lines.
survivors.example_real:
- @aldeebajofficial Thank you for this elegance✨

#ootd #abaya #hijabi #reels #muslimah
survivors.example_fresh: ذوقها علّمنا شي جديد عن قطعتنا… شكراً نورة 🤍
survivors.anti: Assembly-line gratitude — five identical 'شكراً على الذوق ✨' posts a week reads as a bot; the admiration must say one specific thing only her photo earned.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion native (styling is visible proof); beauty for looks and swatches; F&B reposts plates and gatherings.
survivors.judge_why: UGC admiration with a specificity requirement (say the one thing only her photo earned) — that single rule is what separates it from bot gratitude.

survivors.move: Write one short Arabic line and one English line that are twins in spirit but each idiomatic in its own language — never a literal translation — so both halves of the audience feel addressed first, with the product sitting quietly inside both.
survivors.skeleton: statement hook + warm/aspirational register + Arabic <=8 words and English <=8 words + 2 beats: Arabic line → English twin re-created, not translated
survivors.when: Mall brands, fragrance, premium beauty with mixed Saudi+expat audiences. NOT for hyper-local Saudi humor (it dies in translation) and not when the Arabic is just transliterated English.
survivors.example_real:
‎وجهتكم لعطركم المميز ✨

Your home for your signature scent ✨ #bathandbodyworks
survivors.example_fresh: ريحتك توصل قبلك ✨ Your scent walks in first
survivors.anti: Google-translate twins — one line is clearly the original and the other a corpse; or doubling length until the caption becomes a paragraph in two languages and breaks the SHORT law.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion/beauty/retail core (mall-brand reality); local F&B brands are usually stronger in pure Saudi dialect — skip it there.
survivors.judge_why: Borderline format-tag, kept for one reason: the twins-not-translation craft rule is testable and the fresh line (ريحتك توصل قبلك / Your scent walks in first) proves it generates; restrict to mall-brand contexts as drafted.

survivors.move: Voice one tiny confession the audience recognizes in themselves, then command a costless micro-gesture (raise a hand, drop a like, prove you exist) to claim it — the brand counts hands and sells nothing.
survivors.skeleton: confession-then-command hook · playful dare register · <=10 words · beat 1: the relatable 'whoever...' line, beat 2: the physical/digital gesture command.
survivors.when: Evergreen engagement, light days, dead air between campaigns. NOT on solemn occasions; never attach an offer — the hand-raise only works when raising it costs nothing.
survivors.example_real:
لازم تثبت وجودك🤣🤩
#جمشيد 
اثبت وجودك مع عطور اجمل😍
survivors.example_fresh: اللي ما يبدأ يومه بدون قهوة، يرفع يده ✋
survivors.anti: The dare turns into homework ('comment, share, follow and tag 3 friends') — stacking asks kills the reflex; one gesture, one beat.
survivors.sector_flavor: universal — the confession adapts: F&B appetites, beauty routines ('still sleeping in makeup?'), retail hoarding habits, gym excuses.
survivors.judge_why: Mechanic is sound (confession + one costless gesture) but the real example shows no confession at all (اثبت وجودك مع عطور اجمل is brand-speak) and the coffee fresh is the exact vagueness the tag-cards ban; needs a precision rule borrowed from tag_the_character.

survivors.move: Frame the modest choice as presence and power — the garment amplifies her, never hides her — and let pride carry the line with zero defensiveness and zero preaching.
survivors.skeleton: proud-statement hook + dignified warm register + <=8 words + 2 beats: the modest choice → the power it carries
survivors.when: Abaya/hijab lines, modest activewear, occasion modestwear. NEVER comparative (no judging less-covered women), never veil-removal narratives, never 'despite the hijab' framing — these are red lines, not preferences.
survivors.example_real: In Love with these Abayas🌸
survivors.example_fresh: حشمة وأناقة؟ عمرهم ما كانوا خيارين
survivors.anti: Sermonizing — the post turns from fashion to fatwa and the warmth dies; or defensive framing ('محتشمة بس ستايلش') where the 'بس' concedes modesty needed an excuse.
survivors.sector_flavor: Fashion/beauty specific — the core identity move of this lens; retail can extend it to modest sportswear and occasion gifting.
survivors.judge_why: Sector-core identity move with the red lines handled correctly — but 'In Love with these Abayas' evidences nothing; per the self-audit rule a card with no demonstrating gold is not ratification-ready. Find the real gold or it stays drafted.

killed: owned_weekday_ritual — exact duplicate of named_weekday_ritual: same underlying move (claim a weekday, name it, greet the regulars) and the SAME الأحد_الشاورمري gold. The named_ version is sharper (dish-day pair + 'the one who...' persona beat). Merged into named_weekday_ritual.

table_role_tag — exact duplicate of tag_the_character: identical بارنز gold (نفس القعدة.. نفس الأدوار). Kept the two-role-scene version for sharper casting precision and cross-sector reach; its qa3da insight merges into the survivor.

do_you_remember — duplicate of nostalgia_checkpoint (same resurface-the-memory-and-ask move, visible from the 'Resur…' stem) AND it arrived truncated in the payload: unverifiable content cannot be ratified — readiness claims obey the evidence rule.

long_day_exhale — double kill: (1) example_real is built on the banned word (أخيراً لحظة استرخاء) and the card admits it; (2) the underlying frame — tired worker rewarded by arriving food — is among the most worn frames in Gulf F&B delivery copy, and the anti polices misery-inflation, not the wear itself. Cliché-prone, anti can't save it.

not_just_reframe — 'مو مجرد X' is a fill-in-the-blank already saturated across Arabic ad-speak; the anti polices the second clause while the disease is the literal opener, which every copier copies verbatim. This re-creates the every-brand-sounds-the-same disease the system exists to kill.

round2_backlog.unjudged_truncated: resend the 8 cards lost in payload truncation
missing_moves: legal_real_offer — invented offers are banned, but nobody drafted the legal way to announce a TRUE offer or price news with dignity; as drafted, the pool has no lawful move for the single most common brief a client sends.

craft_process_proof — behind-the-counter making-of (the 4am dough, the charcoal, the spice toast) as zero-adjective product evidence; the biggest F&B gap in the pool — every product card argues by consequence or wordplay, none by shown process.

owned_flaw_confession — the brand admits one true small flaw (the parking, the wait) to buy trust in everything else; crowd_judges' bolder sibling and the strongest trust mechanic in the genre — absent.
iftar_clock — the minutes-before-iftar / suhoor-countdown timing mechanic; sofra_stage owns the table but nobody owns the clock, which is Ramadan's strongest native tension.
sensory_sound_word — قرمشة/sizzle onomatopoeia compression, the F&B twin of one_word_verdict: sound instead of adjectives. Expected and undrafted (may live in the 8 unseen cards).
